title: Todos — Austin move + Brotein launch + summer 2025 planning
html:
Todos — Austin move + Brotein launch + summer 2025 planning

Source: 2025-05-30 Apple Note, last modified 2026-04-03 — almost a year of running todos. The single biggest "what was Yahir doing" log in the corpus.

TL;DR

This is the operational backbone of mid-2025 — the bridge period between OSU and Austin. Themes:

  • The Austin move — recurring "decide on official move day", "apply to apartments", "figure out how to get remaining things from Corvallis". Eventually executes mid-September 2025 per 2025 09 23 how im scraping by.
  • Brotein is the active project — codes, Supabase uploads, leaderboard, group share, TikTok marketing, "Brotein werun group". Pre-Rankett primary venture.
  • ISSA CPT certification — recurring "pay for ISSA exam", "call ISSA" — Yahir was getting certified as a personal trainer, likely connected to the gym job bridge income strategy.
  • Public speaking class — "74201 CRN PUBLIC SPEAKING" — taking it remotely from OSU.
  • Family/friend obligations — recurring "call dad", "call maya", "call david", scrapbook for roxanna, bolts for mom, food for dad.

Pattern observed

This note is the densest example of Yahir's stacked column note pattern — life logistics + business todos + relationship maintenance + financial juggling all in one running list, dated by entry. The format is "date header + bullets" repeating. This note IS his external working memory for ~10 months.

Entities surfaced (people)

  • david, tanner, maya, cuva (roommate/friend), brad (boss?), roxane / roxanna (likely same person, typo)
  • Family: dad, mom (already in Memory)

Recurring obligations / personal goals (one-liner)

  • "be a project youth plus donor"
  • "go to Mongolia"
  • "find a beautiful wife"

These three sit in the 7/22/25 entry as life-aspirations alongside the move logistics. Mongolia + wife + youth donation = a snapshot of what Yahir wanted his life to mean beyond the grind.

Open questions

  • Did the ISSA exam get done? Is he a certified personal trainer now?
  • Status of Brotein today — paused, sunsetted, or still active in parallel with Rankett?
  • The "other app idea" mentioned 8/12/2025 — what was it? (Possibly one of the .)
  • Public speaking class — completed?

Related

  • brotein
  • austin tx
  • corvallis or
  • issa cpt
  • bridge income strategies
  • post china limbo — operational backbone of the Jan–Aug 2025 limbo
